Name: Swordfish Storage CoS Message Registry
Description: This registry defines the event messages for Swordfish Storage Class of Service based implementations.

ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Description: Indicates that the class of service is out of compliance.
ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.LongDescription: Indicates that the class of service is out of compliance.
ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Message: The service level requirements of the `%1` class of service are out of compliance.
ArgDescriptions: The name of the `ClassOfService` that is out of compliance.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the name of the `ClassOfService`  that is out of compliance.
ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Resolution: Resolution dependent upon class of service and resource type.

LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Description: Indicates that the line of service is out of compliance.
LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.LongDescription: Indicates that the line of service is out of compliance.
LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Message: The service level requirements of the `%1` line of service are out of compliance.
ArgDescriptions: The name of the `LineOfService` that is out of compliance.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the name of the `LineOfService` that is out of compliance.
LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Resolution: Resolution dependent upon line of service and resource type.

OutOfCompliance.Description: Indicates that the service level requirements are out of compliance.
OutOfCompliance.LongDescription: Indicates that the line of service is out of compliance.
OutOfCompliance.Message: The service level requirements of `%1` are out of compliance.
ArgDescriptions: The name of the `LineOfService` that has service level requirements out of compliance.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the name of the `LineOfService` that has service level requirements out of compliance.
OutOfCompliance.Resolution: Resolution dependent upon service level and resource type.
